title: Dictionary Key
documentation:
## Purpose

Dictionary Key is a plain-text string that identifies an entry within a key-value dictionary or record. It is used by nodes that read from or write to structured data by specifying which slot to access.

## When to use

Use this media type when a node must address a specific field within a dictionary-shaped payload. It pairs naturally with [Substitutions](https://capdag.com/browse/media:substitutions;textable;record) or [Schema Variables](https://capdag.com/browse/media:schema-variables;textable;record) when a single key needs to be extracted or overridden.

## Notes

Key values are opaque strings; the system does not interpret dots or brackets as path separators unless the consuming node explicitly documents that behavior. Use a consistent naming convention across your pipeline to avoid ambiguity.
